creator: conall@galvatron.taku.ie
text:
When installed squeezeserver from audio/squeezeserver disables Apple
	Loseless support because it cannot find alac

Fix: 

Install audio/alac from ports, to provide squeezeserver with the 
	expected decoder. audio/alac should be added as an optional encoder aloc
	with LAME, FAAC, FLAC, etc
How-To-Repeat: 	Install audio/squeezeserver and try to play Apple Loseless (.m4a) files
